Hi {{$('Get row(s) in sheet').first().json['First Name']}},

Just looping back on this.

Most solar operators lose the lead not because of pricing or product — but because of what happens in the window between form submission and first contact. That gap is where the decision usually gets made.

The longer that window stays open, the more it works in favour of whoever responds first — not necessarily whoever has the better offer.

The 60-second video I mentioned shows one way to close that gap on the website itself.

Want me to send it over?

Yassine
AI Automation Specialist
